name: Chicken Curry in a Hurry
recipeIngredient: 4 whole chicken breast halves without skin, boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the chicken with salt and pepper, then sauté until just cooked through (about 5 minutes per side). Transfer to a plate.
3. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon of fat from the skillet.
4. Add curry powder and stir until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
5. Add brandy and cook until almost evaporated, standing back in case it ignites.
6. Mix in flour.
7. Add broth, sour cream, and chutney, then stir until smooth.
8. Increase heat to high and boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce coats a spoon lightly.
9. Return chicken (and any collected juices) to the skillet. Cook until heated through (about 2 minutes).
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
